title: fix(deps): update common, image, and storage deps
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | digest | `586a3be` -> `6eebb37` |
| [github.com/containers/image/v5](https://togithub.com/containers/image) | require | digest | `07ced61` -> `dc6d2c8` |
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | digest | `cc0d208` -> `73f2995` |

New changes are detected. LGTM label has been removed.

All FYI- renovate will force-push (in this case from 25b7d75 to 59bf47d) PRs when it thinks they're out of date or need to be rebased or something (I'm not sure).  In case it helps (here or anywhere else) you can stop this behavior in two ways (if it's necessary):

1. Add the `stop-updating` label to the PR (seems to mostly work, but not all the time)
2. Add a commit to the PR on top of the renovate generated one (guaranteed to work)

> All FYI- renovate will force-push (in this case from [25b7d75](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/25b7d75293908bc33b7e3a05c625b27d10b2563c) to [59bf47d](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/59bf47d2a6b6d237c526acb912ef648ffef2cfe2)) PRs when it thinks they're out of date or need to be rebased or something (I'm not sure). In case it helps (here or anywhere else) you can stop this behavior in two ways (if it's necessary):
> 
>     1. Add the `stop-updating` label to the PR (seems to mostly work, but not all the time)
> 
>     2. Add a commit to the PR on top of the renovate generated one (guaranteed to work)

No this PR is was not updated automatically, I requested the rebase because of merge conflicts. I think we disabled the auto rebase in the podman repo?! I only see this behaviour on other repos.

> I requested the rebase because of merge conflicts.

Oh okay, no worries then.

> I think we disabled the auto rebase in the podman repo

We did.  Though I think renovate will still force-push to it's PRs in some other situations, maybe I'm wrong.

> PR needs rebase.

okay, I checked the "renovate please rebase this" button.

Tests are breaking here!

I did a brief skim and apart from flakes one common factor seems to be a missing `Storing signatures` in push output.
Did https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2001 remove this output, @mtrmac? Do we have to fixup all tests?

Yes, c/image is now not saying `Storing signatures` if there are no signatures to store.

It’s a purely aesthetic thing, so if this were a deadline blocker or something, I’m fine with temporarily reverting that.

OTOH I do think it’s a move in the right direction overall, so past the immediate short-term concerns I’d prefer the tests to be updated if they expect that output.

Do you need me to help with the test update?
If fixing the test is the right thing then I can do it, I just wanted an ack from you.
I believe the tests should be fixed.

PR needs rebase.

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
